login.title: Your nutrition, organized
login.subtitle: Sign in as a patient or professional to validate identity flow before building business contexts.
login.formSubtitle: Select a role and use demo credentials or a registered account.
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials for the selected role.

register.title: Start with the right role
register.subtitle: Registration creates a json-server user and signs in automatically with a simulated JWT.
register.formSubtitle: Choose patient or nutritionist based on the experience you want to review.
register.emailExists: An account already exists with that email.
register.failed: The account could not be created.

onboarding.title: Complete your starting point
onboarding.subtitle: This step marks the profile as ready to enter the protected experience.

session.title: Active session, {{name}}
session.subtitle: IAM is ready: mock token persisted, role resolved, and protected access working.

dashboard.title: Hi, {{name}}
dashboard.subtitle: Week 3 is active with a muscle gain goal. Review your progress and jump into key tasks.

actions.plan: View daily targets and suggested meals.
actions.recipes: Explore recipes matched to your profile.

placeholder.title: Module in progress
placeholder.subtitle: This entry point is already protected and ready for the detailed context functionality.

plan.title: My weekly plan
plan.subtitle: The active nutrition plan, daily targets, and professional consultation will connect here.

log.title: Log meal
log.subtitle: This placeholder reserves food search, portion selection, and daily logging.

recipes.title: Recipes for you
recipes.subtitle: Recommended recipes will filter by goal, macros, and patient preferences.

progress.title: My progress
progress.subtitle: Weight, adherence, calorie trends, and macro evolution will live here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Protected channel for conversations with the assigned nutritionist.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Reserved space for profile, dietary restrictions, language, and account settings.

workspace.subtitle: Review your active patients, pending tasks and messages from a single protected space.

reviews.title: Pending reviews
reviews.subtitle: Plans and checkpoints waiting for your sign-off.
reviews.empty: No reviews pending. You are all caught up.

samples.question1: Can I swap the afternoon snack for fruit?
samples.question2: Should I keep the plan over the weekend?
samples.thanks: Thanks, the new plan is working great!
samples.reschedule: Could we move our next appointment?
samples.update: Logged my meals for the week.

patients.title: Patients
patients.subtitle: Select a patient to open their record.

notes.adjustCarbs: Adjust carbohydrate intake on training days.
notes.increaseProtein: Increase protein at breakfast to support recovery.
notes.reviewLabs: Review the latest lab work before the next visit.
notes.maintainPlan: Maintain the current plan and reassess in two weeks.

detail.emptySubtitle: Choose a patient from the list to see their summary.

placeholders.nutritionDesc: Build and assign meal plans from the clinical workspace.
placeholders.communicationDesc: Two-way patient messaging will live here.

patient.title: Your conversation
patient.empty: You don't have any messages yet.

nutritionist.title: Conversations
nutritionist.subtitle: Reply to your patients from a single inbox.
nutritionist.emptySubtitle: Pick a patient from the inbox to read and reply.

thread.empty: No messages in this conversation yet.

samples.welcome: Welcome to BiteWise! I'll be your nutritionist.
samples.planQuestion: Hi! I have a question about this week's plan.
samples.snackSwap: Can I swap the afternoon snack for fruit?
samples.checkIn: How did your meals go this week?
samples.progressUpdate: Pretty well, I kept the calorie target most days.
samples.labReminder: Remember to send your latest lab results before our visit.
samples.scheduleAsk: Could we move our next appointment to Friday?
